config_template.notes: Reduced dim must be tile-padded; inputs with shape[dim] < TOPK_MIN_WIDTH (64) require ttnn.pad with -inf before topk; k is often padded to tile boundary (align_to_tile(k)) then sliced back with slice_to_length; implicit tile padding must be filled (ttnn.fill_implicit_tile_padding) to avoid garbage entries in results

applicability_notes: fusion_notes: ['MoE decode path: ttnn.topk + add(mask) + eqz + typecast + softmax + mul + sum fuses into single ttnn.moe(gate_logits, top_k_mask, top_2_mask, k) op', 'Common downstream chain: topk -> to_layout(ROW_MAJOR) -> typecast(int32) -> ttnn.sampling for on-device top-k/top-p sampling', 'MoE routing chain: softmax -> topk -> softmax(top_k_values) -> scatter into dense routing tensor', 'float32 inputs may fall back to argmax-based topk (topk_indices_argmax) or a fallback op at some call sites']

placement_observations.size_descriptor: logits [1,1,32,vocab_size] decode-time sampling, vocab padded to tile width
placement_observations.source: qwen3_tts device sampling: logits_tt created with memory_config=ttnn.DRAM_MEMORY_CONFIG before ttnn.topk(logits_tt, k=max_top_k, dim=-1)
MoE expert-group routing: input padded with -inf to TOPK_MIN_WIDTH (64) via ttnn.pad before ttnn.topk when shape[3] < TOPK_MIN_WIDTH
sampling pipeline: topk indices converted via ttnn.to_layout(ROW_MAJOR_LAYOUT) then ttnn.typecast(int32) before ttnn.sampling
perf test: ttnn.topk(tt_input, k, dim=-1, memory_config=TOPK_MEMORY_CONFIG, sub_core_grids=SUB_CORE_GRIDS) — explicit memory_config and sub_core_grids passed to constrain placement
